name: Cascadia Acquisition Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: Cascadia Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs typically do not have an initial business operation and use funds raised in an initial public offering (IPO) to acquire an existing private company. The company is likely based in the United States.
